---
id: get-snapshot-kpi-graphs-graph-id-snapshots-date-get
title: "Get one daily KPI snapshot"
description: "Returns the complete daily KPI snapshot for a graph, including graph-wide `all_` / `public_` / `private_` metrics and the public-only SHACL validation outputs."
sidebar_label: "Get one daily KPI snapshot"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/graph-kpi/wordlift-graph-kpi-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get one daily KPI snapshot"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/kpi/graphs/{graph_id}/snapshots/{date}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the complete daily KPI snapshot for a graph, including graph-wide `all_` / `public_` / `private_` metrics and the public-only SHACL validation outputs.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"graph_id","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`).","title":"Graph Id","example":"1506805"},"description":"Public WordLift graph identifier (`account.id`)."},{"name":"date","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","description":"Logical KPI day in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.","title":"Date","example":"2026-03-13"},"description":"Logical KPI day in `YYYY-MM-DD` format."}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Complete daily snapshot payload.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"graph_id":{"type":"string","title":"Graph Id","description":"Public WordLift graph identifier.","example":"1506805"},"snapshot_date":{"type":"string","title":"Snapshot Date","description":"Logical KPI day for this snapshot in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.","example":"2026-03-13"},"calculated_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Calculated At","description":"Timestamp when the graph-wide KPI calculation finished.","example":"2026-03-13T17:42:11Z"},"dataset_id":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Dataset Id","description":"Dataset identity used to compute this snapshot. Clone reuse is allowed only when the current dataset identity matches this value.","example":"677fe88046061868443428fa"},"snapshot_origin":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Snapshot Origin","description":"How this snapshot was produced: `calculated` for a full worker run or `cloned` when the previous validated snapshot was reused because the graph source watermark and worker policy inputs had not changed.","example":"calculated"},"cloned_from_snapshot_date":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Cloned From Snapshot Date","description":"When `snapshot_origin=cloned`, the source snapshot day copied into this row.","example":"2026-03-12"},"source_watermark":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Source Watermark","description":"Latest source-graph `_modified_` watermark observed for the dataset when this snapshot was produced.","example":"2026-03-13T17:35:19+00:00"},"kpi_worker_version":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Kpi Worker Version","description":"Worker package version used for clone eligibility and snapshot provenance.","example":"0.2.1"},"validation_rules_fingerprint":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Validation Rules Fingerprint","description":"Stable fingerprint of the validation selector and options that affect SHACL/rich-snippet outcomes.","example":"d80c5dfb1c704f738f7662ee2a650c4a21ddbbf95d5af4f4fefb162eb4d53f04"},"validated_at":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Validated At","description":"Timestamp when SHACL/rich-snippet validation finished.","example":"2026-03-13T17:50:02Z"},"all_total_entities":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Total Entities","description":"All entities in the graph snapshot."},"public_total_entities":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Total Entities","description":"Entities that have at least one public assertion."},"private_total_entities":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Total Entities","description":"Entities that have no public assertions."},"all_total_properties":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Total Properties","description":"All non-`rdf:type` assertions in the snapshot."},"public_total_properties":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Total Properties","description":"Non-`rdf:type` assertions whose predicate is public."},"private_total_properties":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Total Properties","description":"Non-`rdf:type` assertions whose predicate is private."},"all_total_triples":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Total Triples","description":"All assertions in the snapshot, including `rdf:type`."},"public_total_triples":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Total Triples","description":"Assertions whose predicate is public."},"private_total_triples":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Total Triples","description":"Assertions whose predicate is private."},"all_internal_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Internal Edges Count","description":"Internal links across all assertions, excluding literals and `rdf:type`."},"public_internal_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Internal Edges Count","description":"Internal links created by public assertions."},"private_internal_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Internal Edges Count","description":"Internal links created by private assertions."},"all_external_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All External Edges Count","description":"External links across all assertions, excluding literals and `rdf:type`."},"public_external_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public External Edges Count","description":"External links created by public assertions."},"private_external_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private External Edges Count","description":"External links created by private assertions."},"all_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edges Count","description":"All internal and external links, excluding literals and `rdf:type`."},"public_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edges Count","description":"Edges created by public assertions only."},"private_edges_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edges Count","description":"Edges created by private assertions only."},"all_edge_node_ratio":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edge Node Ratio","description":"All edges divided by all entities."},"public_edge_node_ratio":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edge Node Ratio","description":"Public edges divided by public entities."},"private_edge_node_ratio":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edge Node Ratio","description":"Private edges divided by private entities."},"all_edge_node_ratio_edges":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edge Node Ratio Edges","description":"Numerator used for `all_edge_node_ratio`."},"public_edge_node_ratio_edges":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edge Node Ratio Edges","description":"Numerator used for `public_edge_node_ratio`."},"private_edge_node_ratio_edges":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edge Node Ratio Edges","description":"Numerator used for `private_edge_node_ratio`."},"all_edge_node_ratio_nodes":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Edge Node Ratio Nodes","description":"Denominator used for `all_edge_node_ratio`."},"public_edge_node_ratio_nodes":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Edge Node Ratio Nodes","description":"Denominator used for `public_edge_node_ratio`."},"private_edge_node_ratio_nodes":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Edge Node Ratio Nodes","description":"Denominator used for `private_edge_node_ratio`."},"all_unique_urls_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Unique Urls Count","description":"Distinct `schema:url` values in the snapshot."},"public_unique_urls_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Unique Urls Count","description":"Same as `all_unique_urls_count` because `schema:url` is public."},"private_unique_urls_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Unique Urls Count","description":"Always `0` because `schema:url` is not private."},"all_orphans_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Orphans Count","description":"Public orphans plus private orphans."},"public_orphans_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Orphans Count","description":"Public entities that are never targets of public internal edges."},"private_orphans_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Orphans Count","description":"Private entities that are never targets of any internal edges."},"all_broken_links_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Broken Links Count","description":"Public broken links plus private broken links."},"public_broken_links_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Broken Links Count","description":"Missing targets referenced by public internal edges."},"private_broken_links_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Broken Links Count","description":"Missing targets referenced by private internal edges."},"all_isolated_graphs_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Isolated Graphs Count","description":"Public isolated graphs plus private isolated graphs."},"public_isolated_graphs_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Isolated Graphs Count","description":"Connected components built from public entities and public internal edges."},"private_isolated_graphs_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Isolated Graphs Count","description":"Connected components for private entities using public internal edges that connect private entities."},"all_duplicates_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Duplicates Count","description":"Duplicate groups sharing the same `schema:url`."},"public_duplicates_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Duplicates Count","description":"Same as `all_duplicates_count` because `schema:url` is public."},"private_duplicates_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Duplicates Count","description":"Always `0` because `schema:url` is not private."},"all_entity_types":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Entity Types","description":"Counts of all `rdf:type` assertions grouped by type IRI."},"public_entity_types":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Entity Types","description":"Counts of `rdf:type` assertions whose type IRI is not in a private namespace."},"private_entity_types":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Entity Types","description":"Counts of `rdf:type` assertions whose type IRI is in a private namespace."},"all_properties_by_predicate":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"All Properties By Predicate","description":"Counts of non-`rdf:type` assertions grouped by predicate."},"public_properties_by_predicate":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Public Properties By Predicate","description":"Counts of non-`rdf:type` assertions grouped by public predicate."},"private_properties_by_predicate":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Private Properties By Predicate","description":"Counts of non-`rdf:type` assertions grouped by private predicate."},"rich_snippets_valid_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Rich Snippets Valid Count","description":"Public rich-snippet items that passed validation."},"rich_snippets_invalid_count":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Rich Snippets Invalid Count","description":"Public rich-snippet items that failed validation."},"rich_snippets_by_type":{"anyOf":[{"additionalProperties":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"integer"},"type":"object"},"type":"object"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Rich Snippets By Type","description":"Public rich-snippet counts grouped by type and eligibility bucket."},"schema_compliance_errors":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Schema Compliance Errors","description":"Schema-compliance errors found in public URL-generated subgraphs."},"schema_compliance_warnings":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Schema Compliance Warnings","description":"Schema-compliance warnings found in public URL-generated subgraphs."},"schema_compliance_urls_checked":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Schema Compliance Urls Checked","description":"Number of public URLs validated for schema compliance."},"graph_health_score":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Score","description":"Composite graph health score from `0` to `100` based on validation, structure, public footprint, and freshness."},"graph_health_validation_health":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Validation Health","description":"Validation-health subscore used in `graph_health_score`."},"graph_health_structural_integrity":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Structural Integrity","description":"Structural-integrity subscore used in `graph_health_score`."},"graph_health_public_footprint_quality":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Public Footprint Quality","description":"Public-footprint-quality subscore used in `graph_health_score`."},"graph_health_freshness_momentum":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"title":"Graph Health Freshness Momentum","description":"Freshness-and-momentum subscore used in `graph_health_score`."}},"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object","required":["graph_id","snapshot_date"],"title":"SnapshotResponse"},"example":{"graph_id":"1506805","snapshot_date":"2026-03-13","calculated_at":"2026-03-13T17:42:11Z","dataset_id":"677fe88046061868443428fa","snapshot_origin":"calculated","source_watermark":"2026-03-13T17:35:19+00:00","kpi_worker_version":"0.2.17","validation_rules_fingerprint":"d80c5dfb1c704f738f7662ee2a650c4a21ddbbf95d5af4f4fefb162eb4d53f04","validated_at":"2026-03-13T17:50:02Z","all_total_entities":58730,"public_total_entities":56211,"private_total_entities":2519,"all_total_properties":430122,"public_total_properties":402991,"private_total_properties":27131,"all_total_triples":488511,"public_total_triples":457184,"private_total_triples":31327,"all_edges_count":176597,"public_edges_count":165901,"private_edges_count":10696,"all_edge_node_ratio":3.01,"public_edge_node_ratio":2.95,"private_edge_node_ratio":4.25,"all_unique_urls_count":217,"public_unique_urls_count":217,"private_unique_urls_count":0,"all_orphans_count":47938,"public_orphans_count":45501,"private_orphans_count":2437,"all_broken_links_count":4,"public_broken_links_count":4,"private_broken_links_count":0,"all_isolated_graphs_count":3514,"public_isolated_graphs_count":3468,"private_isolated_graphs_count":46,"all_duplicates_count":105,"public_duplicates_count":105,"private_duplicates_count":0,"all_entity_types":{"http://schema.org/Product":1200},"public_entity_types":{"http://schema.org/Product":1180},"private_entity_types":{"http://data.wordlift.io/private/HiddenProduct":20},"all_properties_by_predicate":{"schema:name":58730,"schema:offers":1191},"public_properties_by_predicate":{"schema:name":56211,"schema:offers":1188},"private_properties_by_predicate":{"http://data.wordlift.io/private/internalCode":2519},"rich_snippets_valid_count":320,"rich_snippets_invalid_count":188,"rich_snippets_by_type":{"eligible_valid":{"http://schema.org/Product":167},"eligible_invalid":{"http://schema.org/Product":98}},"schema_compliance_errors":42,"schema_compliance_warnings":11441,"schema_compliance_urls_checked":217,"graph_health_score":76,"graph_health_validation_health":67,"graph_health_structural_integrity":71,"graph_health_public_footprint_quality":97,"graph_health_freshness_momentum":90}}}},"400":{"description":"The
